script_content: CREATE TABLE cus_wrap (\n    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT
status: \n    package_code VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL COMMENT '包装种类代码'
submitted_at: \n    package_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '包装种类名称'
deployed_at: \n    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否启用'
environment: \n    effective_date DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '生效日期'
column11: \n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
column12: \n    UNIQUE KEY uk_package_code (package_code)\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='包装种类代码表';

script_content: CREATE TABLE cus_country (\n    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT
status: \n    country_code VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL COMMENT '国家地区代码'
submitted_at: \n    country_english_short VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL COMMENT '国际标准英文简称'
deployed_at: \n    country_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '中文国家地区名称'
environment: \n    country_english_name VARCHAR(200) COMMENT '英文国家地区名称'
column9: \n    tax_rate_mark CHAR(1) COMMENT '优惠/普通税率标记(L-普通
column11: \n    tonnage_tax_mark CHAR(1) COMMENT '船舶吨税优/普标记(L-普通
column13: \n    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否启用'
column14: \n    effective_date DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '生效日期'
column16: \n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
column17: \n    UNIQUE KEY uk_country_code (country_code)\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='国别地区代码表';

script_content: CREATE TABLE cus_trade (\n    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT
status: \n    trade_code VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL COMMENT '监管方式代码'
submitted_at: \n    trade_short_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '监管方式简称'
deployed_at: \n    trade_full_name TEXT COMMENT '监管方式全称'
environment: \n    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否启用'
column9: \n    effective_date DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '生效日期'
column11: \n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
column12: \n    UNIQUE KEY uk_trade_code (trade_code)\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='监管方式代码表';
